revision.comment: Protected "[[Module:Gallery/styles.css]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: match parent ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:Gallery/styles.css]]
Uses a flex container to allow align multi-row galleries
